description: Revenue model — starting from ฿0. Ranked by founder priority, annotated with time-to-revenue (ttr), effort, gross-margin profile, and the NIRVA product(s) each stream monetizes. The sequence is deliberately cash-first → recurring-later.

streams.note: Org CT-scan / digital-readiness / ISO-readiness assessments. Funds the build, generates pilots, produces real data and case studies. Start HERE.
Per-active-worker pricing. BEST = anchor customer (1,356 workers). Land-and-expand entry product.
Premium per-org. Sells to the buyer with budget (CEO/MD). Natural upsell after CHECK provides the data.
ROI story is strongest (fraud/leakage reduction). Transaction + subscription.
Per-standard modules on the standards_kb engine. Sticky, high willingness-to-pay (cert/tender gated).
Sell industry starter-kits (SOPs/docs/audit programs) — productized consulting; low marginal cost.
Per-employee learning + certification; complements compliance/training matrix.
Vendor/dealer network + B2B trade once procurement volume exists. Network-effect play.
ISO consultants, accountants, FM brokers resell NIRVA. Channel leverage.
The end-state: full OS subscription. Everything above is the on-ramp that funds and de-risks this.

sequencing_logic: Cash-first (Consulting + Blueprints) funds product. CHECK is the cheap, urgent wedge that captures clean data. EXECUTIVE monetizes the buyer with budget. PROCURE/COMPLIANCE deliver the biggest ROI and stickiness. Marketplace/SaaS are the long-term compounding engines once volume and trust exist.
